author: @lukiekelen5553
text:
Looking throughout the comments, most worship thermodynamics fake laws. Oh three is "free energy"/energy from nothing. It's called flux-gating where two different materials with different magnetic permeability is used to block opposing magnetic field and allow primary magnetic field to flow. The effect is very clear on a single phase switched reluctance core where the material for the stator is metglas or amorphous metal while the rotor is electrical steel. You can tell why it would work but too expensive.

Next, the parametric excitation of electric oscillations either mechanically or electrically. As stated, parametric excitation occurs when the inductance of a resonant circuit is twice the resonant frequency. This process does not consume energy as opposed to electromagnetic induction. The prime mover is aided by the inductor instead. Cool huh? Electrically, it would be the "paraformer" or parametric transformer. It is incomplete however as you need another capacitor in parallel with the primary winding. Although it would become a parametric isolator instead where two tank circuits are parametrically coupled together. Forming a 2nd order parametric resonance.

author: @yougeo
text: The only two natural (excluding manmade radio and powerline stuff) atmospheric free energy sources I know are those that rectify either the difference at altitude of potential (usually using a high wire held by a balloon or drone) and those that rectify the alternating potential caused by the constant squeezing and pulsing of the ionosphere being hit by solar wind. I once saw a guy claiming the latter was trappable by keeping a large  10 feet or 100 ft or more in diameter) circle of elevated ( say 10 ft off the ground by wood posts)  wire at a high constant voltage ( maybe several thousand or hundred volts. I forget)  and then rectify the alternating  potential induced in that large electric field create by the wire circle. Ideally the power from the alternating potential of the field would be more than the DC potential power needed to maintain the wire circle at high voltage with any losses. Supposedly the large wire circle creates a large virtual high voltage field bigger than the wire circle itself that can be affected by coupling or being "squeezed" by the fluctuations in the earth high ionosphere.

author: @Zakardis
text: I've always been bothered by the term "free energy". In what manner is it free? If there's hydro, wind, geothermal, or solar, aren't they free? I mean it's only the cost to set it up, then it makes power for it's lifespan. If a new principle is discovered for some electric generation it will go from "free energy" to being called by whatever name it gets called; so even if you discover "free energy", you really didn't discover "free energy", you discovered something else.

author: @bartronicsecurity
text: Actually magic shops are not the only place you get them. They are available for back up emergency lighting as well from electrical stores. These LED lights work as per normal in a standard application and come with screw in or bayonet fitting. While in the on position they charge an internal 3v7 LiPo cell as well. Then if the power were to fail, the fact that there is still a continuous closed circuit in the wiring of the rest of the electrical circuit on the DB board is used to sense if the light is supposed to be on or not. Simply isolating the light bulb from the rest of the house wiring via it’s on/ off switch means the light does not sense a closed circuit and it will switch off. So this type of light bulb will work whether there is mains power or not. Admittedly the battery light given off is far less than the full power from the mains but it does work well for us here in South Africa.

author: @totherarf
text:
Ironically if you stretch a copper wire out in virtually any building in the UK you will have a "Free Energy" device that does actually work!
Obviously the power collected would be minuscule (electomagnetic induction from internal wiring) butt it is a thing!
If you want larger demonstration try holding one end of a flourescent tube directly under a pylon ..... there will be enough voltage to strike it up! ..... Again a real thing! 
There have been people prosecuted for abstraction of elelctricity from running wires running parallel with the wires between pylons. They tried to argue that as there was no direct connection to the grid it didn't count. They lost!

author: @zdzisawk5198
text: Free energy. 1.Resonating L1C1 tank with high Q (quality factor) The higher frequency the better. 2. Transferring power from L1 to  L2 (transformer). 3. Power factor correction with capacitor (range of few microfarad) in series and load in series. Capacitor will shift phase from 90 degree to about 20 degree( the closer to zero degree the better) This is principle and it works with huge COP. LC tank could be either in series or parallel but parallel is easier because of relatively low voltage. Its not easy as one have to have some knowledge. Especially about oscillation and power in AC circuits. Tesla coil is perfectly free energy device but people waste their energy to create big sparks instead of find the way to harvest multiply energy into useful work. I hope Mr. Murray-Smith will confirm my words

replies.author: @DoubleBob
replies.text: There is quite a lot of quick-buck copycats that take what is trending and recreate it. As the algorithms seem to do trends on a geographical basis what you describe might be a consequence of a self-reinforcing trend of free-energy charlatans in India. A similar phenomenon exists with Indonesian and Vietnamese "animal rescue" videos that evolved into an entire industry of mass produced, staged animal rescues.

replies.author: @Cryptic_Triptych
replies.text:
I am an electrician of 30 years and a welder also. I am very well acquainted with amperage draw, load testing, KwH ratings, 50/60 Hz frequency generation, syncronistic motors, etc. I have watched as people demonstrate their "free energy" inventions and baffled everyone with their BS. I ask them to hook it up to a welding machine or a stove element, but they never will. Anyone can generate enough current to power a circuit board of LEDs, but never will they hook it up to a transfer switch on a house.

If you wish to talk with someone who has a working set up, call Ion Power Group.
